assistant_message:
Không tìm thấy chức năng 'blockchain' trong target 'coingecko_onchain_demo'.

Các chức năng hiện có của target `coingecko_onchain_demo` là:
1. GET /simple/networks/{network}/token_price/{addresses} — Token Price by Token Addresses
2. GET /search/pools — Search Pools & Tokens
3. GET /networks — Supported Networks List (ID Map)
4. GET /networks/{network}/dexes — Supported Dexes List by Network (ID Map)
5. GET /networks/{network}/pools/{address} — Specific Pool Data by Pool Address
6. GET /networks/{network}/pools/multi/{addresses} — Multiple Pools Data by Pool Addresses
7. GET /networks/trending_pools — Trending Pools List
8. GET /networks/{network}/trending_pools — Trending Pools by Network
9. GET /networks/{network}/pools — Top Pools by Network
10. GET /networks/{network}/dexes/{dex}/pools — Top Pools by Dex
11. GET /networks/new_pools — New Pools List
12. GET /networks/{network}/new_pools — New Pools by Network
13. GET /networks/{network}/tokens/{token_address}/pools — Top Pools by Token Address
14. GET /networks/{network}/tokens/{address} — Token Data by Token Address
15. GET /networks/{network}/tokens/multi/{addresses} — Tokens Data by Token Addresses
16. GET /networks/{network}/tokens/{address}/info — Token Info by Token Address
17. GET /networks/{network}/pools/{pool_address}/info — Pool Tokens Info by Pool Address
18. GET /networks/{network}/pools/{pool_address}/ohlcv/{timeframe} — Pool OHLCV chart by Pool Address
19. GET /networks/{network}/pools/{pool_address}/trades — Past 24 Hour Trades by Pool Address
20. GET /tokens/info_recently_updated — Most Recently Updated Tokens List
